Manage Columns

Formula help
Use column names in square brackets, for example [Cost] * [Days].
Supported operators: +, -, *, /, ^, brackets, and percentages.
Examples: [Cost] * 1.2, [Area] ^ 2, [Price] * 10%, [Total] + [Markup Formula].
Checkbox columns count as 1 when checked and 0 when unchecked.
Text/List values are valid only when the cell content is numeric. Tags and Checklist columns cannot be used in formulas.
Formula columns can reference other formula columns, but circular references will display ERROR.
Click a column below to insert it into the formula:
Name Type Options / Formula

Select Tags
